title: Säviä Shia Ramadan Timing 2026 Calendar - Sehri and Iftar Timetable
original_text:
Ramadan calendar for Fiqa-e-Jafria 2026 Säviä depends on today Shia Sehri timing Säviä and today Shia Iftar timing Säviä for the complete month of Ramadan. Ramadan 2026 starts on Feb 19, 2026 and ends on Mar 20, 2026 for Fiqa e Jafria in Säviä. You can see the daily Sehri timing in Säviä and iftar time Säviä in Ramzan at UrduPoint for Fiqa-e-Jafria on this page. However, today Sehri timing in Säviä is 01:05 AM, and today iftar timing Säviä is 11:37 PM as on Jun 20, 2026 (04th Muharram 1448) for the Jafri school of thought.

Shia Sehri timing in Säviä today, on Jun 20, 2026 (04th Muharram 1448), is 01:05 AM, and Shia Iftar timing in Säviä today is 11:37 PM.

Säviä Shia Ramadan Timing 2026 Calendar
If you are fasting this year in Säviä according to Fiqa e Jafria and want to remain on point while starting and breaking your fast, UrduPoint's Shia Sehar o Iftar timings Säviä is there for you. With UrduPoint Shia Ramzan timing of Säviä city, you can have easy access to the most precise Fiqa-e-Jafria Säviä Sehri timings and Säviä iftari timings.
The Säviä Ramadan Calendar for Fiqa-e-Jafria will show you Säviä Shia sehr o iftar timings daily for the whole fasting month of Ramadan. The timing for the complete month of Ramadan for Säviä city for Fiqa e Jafria is here for you. This calendar brings you all the information for the starting time of Roza and the time you can have iftar according to Fiqa-e-Jafria in Säviä.
Now you have the complete and accurate Säviä Shia Ramadan Calendar and the Timetable for the year 2026. Further, you can access the Jafri Sehr-o-Iftar for today in Säviä, Jun 20, 2026. UrduPoint did its best to manage the Jafri Ramadan calendar for Säviä and Säviä Shia Roza timing 2026 for your convenience.
